Welcome to the future of Email

320.000.000.000 emails are sent every day. You can't kill email. That’s why we brought it over to Web3!

Dive into an email experience that values your privacy and turns your attention into an asset.

Embrace the Consensual Marketing Paradigm.

Your Inbox, Your Rules.

Gone are the days of cluttered inboxes and irrelevant ads. EtherMail is pioneering a new era of email marketing — one that respects your privacy and values your time.

Our unique platform empowers users to control what they see and earn from promotional content. We're flipping the script, offering a win-win for both users and advertisers.

With EtherMail, engage with what matters to you and transform your inbox into a source of passive income.

+1.000.000

Verified EtherMail Accounts

+100

Web3 Communities using EtherMail as primary communication channel

THE CORE OF ETHERMAIL

The Web3 Email Inbox

Blockchain-synched real-time information directly into your inbox. Anonymous, smart, and secure.

EMCs

EtherMail coins. In order to receive promotional emails, companies have to pay you for invading your inbox. Get benefits with our $EMT and avoid being spammed by marketers.

Privacy wall

Where users set their custom preferences around designated content sources.

Dapplets

Expand your inbox's capabilities with third-party DApplets, customizing your Web3 email experience.

Aliases

Customize your email address and make it more user-friendly for easy sharing and recall while managing your Aliases settings.

PayWall

Where users are able to define what kind of content they’re willing to read in exchange for rewards

EMCs

EtherMail coins. In order to receive promotional emails, companies have to pay you for invading your inbox. Get benefits with our $EMT and avoid being spammed by marketers.

FEATURES

Brand New features tailored for you

Discover User-Inspired Innovations at EtherMail.

Mobile App

Access your Web3 inbox anywhere, any time. Our platform is designed for both desktop and mobile use.

Email-as-a-wallet

Innovative convergence of email and wallet. Discover simplicity with our 'Email as a Wallet' feature.

Learn more
PayMail

Sending tokens or NFTs is a breeze with PayMail! A two-step verification process, including a zero-gas fees test transaction, ensures secure and error-free transfers. Say goodbye to double spending and gas fees forever.🛡

Learn more
